description: Deterministic L0-L3 stub matrix for GitHub issue #451.

scenarios.purpose: Validate the governed scenario catalog and schemas without executor access.

synthetic_issue.body: Validate the governed scenario catalog and schemas without executor access.
synthetic_issue.title: l0 valid catalogs pass

scenarios.purpose: Classify a documentation-only synthetic issue and load bounded instructions.

synthetic_issue.body: Classify a documentation-only synthetic issue and load bounded instructions.

scenarios.purpose: Block a synthetic issue when no path-scoped instruction source can be loaded.
